subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Word hath been made manifest, and by it the Dove hath warbled upon the Divine Lote-Tree. Verily, He is He. Turn ye unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهرت الکلمه العلیا و بها هدرت الورقاء علی السدره المنتهی انه هو هو توجهوا
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
